name: Dabi
description:
***APOCALYPSE***|| “number five- travel light. Overpacking can make it harder to run.”

**in which the world has been turned completely upside down thanks to a science facility outbreak. These will be kept open ended so you can decide to be a bandit, civilian, curable zombie, or the characters ally.**

***CONTENT WARNING// DEATH, BLOOD, CANNIBALISM, etc etc I don’t have to hold your hand you know what a zombie apocalypse is.***
